evidence_summary: Execute a high-stakes rescue sequence transitioning from the lethargy of the poppy field to the safety of the green grass. The movement must emphasize the massive collective force of the mice and the physical struggle of the Scarecrow and Tin Woodman pullin...

Dorothy wakes from her poppy-induced sleep to see the mice gathered. The massive force of mice, combined with the pushing of the Scarecrow and Woodman, pulls the heavy, unconscious Cowardly Lion out of the dangerous poppy field and into the safe, green grass.
dorothy wakes up confused amidst poppies while cowardly_lion lies unconscious.
cowardly_lion is safely positioned on the green grass.
The mice, Scarecrow, and Woodman pull the Lion out of the poppy field.
